classData.comment:
/**
 * @summary Configuration manager for the Neural Link MCP server.
 *
 * Supports loading configuration from a custom file and merging with defaults.
 *
 * @class Neo.ai.mcp.server.neural-link.Config
 * @extends Neo.ai.ConfigProvider
 * @singleton
 */
classData.summary:
Configuration manager for the Neural Link MCP server.

Supports loading configuration from a custom file and merging with defaults.
classData.name: Config

classData.comment:
/**
             * Repo root, computed from this module's path. Exported for symmetry with the
             * KB and Memory Core configs so consumers (loggers, services, future) can read
             * `aiConfig.neoRootDir` rather than recomputing the 4-level traversal locally.
             * Module path is stable; the resolution is deterministic at boot.
             * @type {string}
             */
classData.description: Repo root, computed from this module's path. Exported for symmetry with the KB and Memory Core configs so consumers (loggers, services, future) can read aiConfig.neoRootDir rather than recomputing the 4-level traversal locally. Module path is stable; the resolution is deterministic at boot.
classData.name: neoRootDir

classData.description: Automatically connect to the bridge on startup.
classData.name: autoConnect

classData.description: The port the WebSocket server is listening on.
classData.name: port
rpcTimeout

classData.description: Path to the memory core SQLite database for action logging.
classData.name: memoryCoreDbPath

classData.comment:
/**
             * Directory for the always-on Neural Link diagnostic log files. The NL server's
             * `logger.mjs` writes daily-rotated entries here regardless of `debug`, so
             * long-running inspection chains and DOM/VDOM introspection sweeps leave a
             * tail-able diagnostic trail observable from the host shell. Default:
             * `<neoRootDir>/.neo-ai-data/logs/` — shared with the KB and Memory Core servers
             * (each uses a distinct filename prefix: `nl-server-`, `kb-server-`, `mc-server-`).
             * Per-server file isolation, single tailable directory.
             * @type {string}
             */
classData.description: Directory for the always-on Neural Link diagnostic log files. The NL server's logger.mjs writes daily-rotated entries here regardless of debug, so long-running inspection chains and DOM/VDOM introspection sweeps leave a tail-able diagnostic trail observable from the host shell. Default: <neoRootDir>/.neo-ai-data/logs/ — shared with the KB and Memory Core servers (each uses a distinct filename prefix: nl-server-, kb-server-, mc-server-). Per-server file isolation, single tailable directory.
classData.name: logPath

classData.summary:
Retention policy for Neural Link MCP diagnostic log files.

The shared logger applies this policy only to files matching the `nl-server`
prefix in `logPath`. `maxFiles` and `maxTotalBytes` count historical files;
the active current-day file is always preserved. Set `enabled=false` to
delegate retention entirely to deployment infrastructure.
classData.name: loggerRetention

classData.comment:
/**
             * @summary Shared MCP logger policy for Neural Link.
             *
             * Always-on file sink plus tier-gated stderr: info/warn/error write without
             * debug, while debug stays gated by `debug: true`.
             * @type {Object}
             */
classData.summary:
Shared MCP logger policy for Neural Link.

Always-on file sink plus tier-gated stderr: info/warn/error write without
debug, while debug stays gated by `debug: true`.
classData.name: logger

classData.description: Maximum characters written when debug: true enables full Bridge payload logging. Default/info Bridge receive logs always use bounded routing metadata instead.
classData.name: bridgePayloadDebugMaxChars

classData.description: Number of days to retain Action logs in the Neural Link Database.
classData.name: pruneLogsAfterDays
